untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'two peaks at approximately same price level with wide rounded tops' requires candlestick pattern detection or swing high/low identification not available in indicator set. Below-average breakout volume condition translated to available indicators, but core pattern detection cannot be expressed with allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Translated 'below average breakout volume outperform' to volume < sma_20 as proxy for below-average volume. Exit condition uses pivot point crossover as reasonable reversal indicator since stop placement and target price mechanics (73-76% of move) require pattern-specific price level calculations unavailable in standard indicators. Success rates (89-98%) and decline percentages (18-25%) are metadata, not actionable conditions. Signal is fundamentally pattern-based and cannot be fully operationalized without swing detection logic.
